channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
item.description: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
item.description: Two consecutive weeks of inflows ended the worst sustained outflow streak in Bitcoin ETF history. Here's why patience may be required from investors.

item.title: Hut 8, IREN deals lift AI-focused Bitcoin mining stocks
item.description: Bitcoin miners rallied as investors cheered multi-billion-dollar AI infrastructure contracts, underscoring the sector’s accelerating shift toward data centers and cloud computing.

item.title: Nigerian president signs order on approach to crypto regulation, taxes
item.description: The West African country’s executive order established a virtual asset council and addressed the fragmentation of crypto regulation for oversight and enforcement.

item.title: Bernstein raises Robinhood price target, cites tokenization and prediction markets
item.description: The brokerage’s blockchain strategy, including tokenized equities and its Arbitrum-based Robinhood Chain, could reduce its reliance on traditional crypto trading, analysts said.

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
item.description: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

item.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
item.description: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin price hits $65K wall as stocks battle ‘record’ institutional tech sell-off
item.description: Bitcoin faced troublesome resistance at $65,000 while traders still saw a potential BTC price breakout into a “bullish market structure.”

item.title: IREN jumps 16% after raising AI cloud revenue target above $4B
item.description: The Bitcoin miner raised its year-end AI cloud revenue target to more than $4 billion after signing $2.8 billion in new contracts with AI developers.

item.title: Ethereum is for shipping. Here are some of the things the Ethereum ecosystem launched, upgraded, and announced over the past month. 0/ @RobinhoodApp launched Robinhood Chain ( @RobinhoodCrypto) on mainnet, an Ethereum Layer 2 built on the @a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBjY2FCdVJhbEJoa05iRkRTT1JSUTFCb1duc3VLR1haLVc0dVQtYVdOLUkzN2dDVVdBMTg0YkZ1V2hqNVNVQ3NHdHIwejNReENYT0wteFMzcjM1Szl2WXc?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is for shipping. Here are some…

item.title: Inside Cardano's 'Van Rossum' hard fork, and what it means for users
item.description: The Van Rossem hard fork moved Cardano to version 11 on Saturday. And for the first time, Cardano's community voted in the upgrade, not the company that built it.

item.title: Something here apparently triggered the crypto spammers & trolls. This has NOTHING to do with a coin or NFT. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE4yQ2hCWmhMbXpSVEd1ek5VbzJFNmtXUlVMSEpLM2NkRXc3SFhxOXo5bDJNZER6S0VkZ1M0MTYtRVcySUVEQTlnYXBDbnJkQmk2SW9rMWZPY29RQ1hkRXpzMnZGNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Something here apparently trigge…

item.title: Exodus to cut 25% of global workforce in payments shift
item.description: This restructuring is part of a strategy to build a full-stack payments platform following the company's acquisitions of Monavate and Baanx.

item.title: AI compute stocks bounce as Hut 8, IREN land billions in new contracts
item.description: The deals sparked a rebound in AI compute stocks after investors questioned demand for new data center capacity.

item.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
item.description: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

item.title: Peter Brandt predicts the exact day Bitcoin’s bear market will be over
item.description: Renowned trading analyst Peter Brandt says investing in Bitcoin today, will pay off much better in two to three years than buying AI stocks at current prices.

item.title: Equities and options live now. Crypto and more on the way. Free for all US-based Robinhood customers. Connect your agent here → rbnhd.co/AgenticTrading… Learn more here → robinhood.com/us/en/agentic-… Options are risky and not appropriate for all i - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBmLXNUZkpPTnpYZHl6clJTRW0wRkJwcUxrZkR6QmhONHpEdXBubnl3a0dFTnVsdUY5eC1lckxpWWZ5cjE4MXZwcm9wdjhqVV9OZ1dQbWVBcHQxSW14TUNqSy1Ldw?oc=5" target="_blank">Equities and options live now. C…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇷🇺 Russia's State Duma to consider bill to regulate Bitcoin & crypto tomorrow, TASS reports 👀 "Tomorrow we'll be passing the law in its second and third readings. It's aimed at creating the legal conditions for cryptocurrencies to function in our country - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFA3V21fSFQ1WTE2ajdGM3NBaDJNb0tXeEYyU2Y0amlnUmQyeGtKTkhmaG8tSE1yNWh1Y0dDdXZOSjI1OUtSMy1yV3FPWlNra2ZVTTJzT3Z0YTRGbUlUZlRaNXZGOEc2RVk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇷🇺 Russia's Stat…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
item.description: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.

item.title: Strategy raises $263.5M through MSTR sales, holds 843,775 Bitcoin
item.description: Strategy boosted its cash reserve to $3.225 billion after selling MSTR shares, while investors weighed the value of its STRC preferred stock.

item.title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
item.description: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.

item.title: Hyperliquid sets 500,000 HYPE stake for permissionless prediction market deployers
item.description: Hyperliquid plans to require developers to stake 500,000 HYPE, worth about $30.4 million, to deploy permissionless prediction markets under HIP-4.

item.title: SAYLOR BOUGHT NO BITCOIN… AGAIN Saylor’s Strategy has once again purchased zero Bitcoin this week. Instead, they sold $263M of MSTR and added $225M to their USD Reserve. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBMR0w0QXNKd0ZVOFNCME1DZEZoejVWanAzbHpZR0tEQlpHRTVRWldTajJreXJaeWkyN195ZVdzVVlhS3lmam02aVpLRklJeUZlRkdBSnVUWVBCUWs?oc=5" target="_blank">SAYLOR BOUGHT NO BITCOIN… AGAIN Saylor’s St…

item.title: Vietnam sets fines for unlicensed crypto trading ahead of regulation rollout
item.description: The new rules establish penalties as much as $1,900 for crypto violations, including unlicensed trading and AML breaches, ahead of Vietnam’s regulated crypto market launch.

item.title: Zilliqa asks exchanges to pause ZIL transfers after suspected cold wallet theft
item.description: Zilliqa said exchanges paused ZIL deposits and withdrawals after an exchange partner’s cold wallet was compromised, with the amount stolen still undisclosed.

item.title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
item.description: The framework will address critical issues like official ownership records, private key custody, transaction reversibility and system liability.

item.title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Opens Prediction Markets to Anyone in HIP-4 Upgrade
item.description: Plus, a selloff in Oil has markets looking green into the Monday open. And PUMP is leading all alt movers on the week at a surprising time.

item.title: A bitcoin 'volmageddon' may be brewing, key indicator suggests
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 20, 2026

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor Makes 110-Point Case Against Bitcoin's BIP-110
item.description: The Strategy chairman argued that the soft fork is a 'bad idea,' warning that it would cause more harm than the problem it aims to solve.

item.title: Bank of Korea prepares for live CBDC transactions with 9 banks in September
item.description: Major banking heavyweights join a massive blockchain network test that will allow retail consumers to trade tokenized won freely across commercial lines.

item.title: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken
item.description: Institutional due diligence is shifting toward continuous monitoring, signer controls and incident readiness after operational failures accounted for most crypto losses.

item.title: Capital B approves 10-for-1 reverse stock split to broaden investor base
item.description: Europe’s second-biggest Bitcoin treasury company said the September reverse stock split should attract more institutional investors to the French company.

item.title: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
item.description: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.

item.title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
item.description: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.

item.title: Crypto market slips even as equities advance. Pump surges on social-media chatter
item.description: With a Fear and Greed index pointing solidly at "fear," crypto prices drifted lower even as stock index futures rose. PUMP's 20% surge was the only real headline in an otherwise quiet session.

item.title: Trader maintains $67K BTC price target: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin preserved a key long-term trend line as support for a third week as US-Iran war tensions delivered new five-week highs in oil prices.

item.title: Hyperliquid plans to add decentralized prediction markets in upgrade to HIP-4
item.description: Permissionless prediction markets will become available first on testnet and later on mainnet, Hyperliquid said.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflows extend to second week, but recovery lacks momentum
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their inflow streak to two weeks with $75.7 million in net inflows, but analysts said demand remains insufficient to fuel a sustained uptrend.

item.title: Cross-chain protocol Allbridge halts after $1.65 million flash loan exploit
item.description: The attacker used a $1.12 million flash loan from Kamino to manipulate pool ratios, enabling them to withdraw assets at favorable rates before bridging funds.

item.title: U.S. regulatory developments and earnings, ECB rate decision: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting July 20.

item.title: $BTC tried to reclaim $65,000 but failed again. As long as Bitcoin stays below it, sellers will be in control. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9JZW9NU3hQTEI2Tm9vdzhuVHp6RXhndVNXbktDMFAwNXZpVXcyVkN1SGEtNWhUeGl3anJWcnFrdmNZTnhIbTZZOHBlNmlWNVhYUFpGY00tdzEzSWp6LVpGMg?oc=5" target="_blank">$BTC tried to reclaim $65,000 but fa…

item.title: Amazon Japan supplier AZ-Com Maruwa to adopt yen stablecoin JPYC for payments
item.description: The Japanese logistics firm plans to pay 2,300 partners, including truck drivers, using JPYC in Japan’s first large-scale corporate stablecoin rollout.

item.title: 🐋 INSIGHT: Bitcoin whales accumulated 66,700 BTC over 60 days, while mid-sized holders sold 77,800 BTC, per CryptoQuant. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE93aG1aWWhiTUdvSHdmRk5FeXh2d2Nxd2I4cFhEaFlrbm8wallhTVIzdEt2MkY2X1RaS3cyQjktbUNMZnRZMi1XeE5vNTZtSHhtUl9JcUlNZGJmS19Tc3NRWmlQdUI?oc=5" target="_blank">🐋 INSIGHT: Bitcoin whales accu…

item.title: South Korea eyes September launch for second phase of CBDC pilot: Report
item.description: The Bank of Korea’s CBDC pilot will add two regional banks, new payment features and tests of government subsidy payments using tokenized bank deposits

item.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises to one-month high of $65,400
item.description: The equity market, meanwhile, awaits second-quarter earnings reports from key tech firms, which begin this week.

item.title: Moonshot AI IPO push follows Kimi, Alibaba AI releases that shook bitcoin
item.description: Days after Kimi K3 rattled chip stocks, Moonshot is moving toward a Hong Kong listing at a $30 billion-plus valuation while Alibaba's Qwen goes open-weight.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs see new money again, but inflows remain ‘peanuts’ relative to the recent exodus
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs have attracted $273 million in new inflows in two weeks, but the total is barely enough to cover a single "slow" week of recent selling.

item.title: Bitcoin flat near $64,000 as oil hits a one-month high and Kimi AI selloff lingers
item.description: Brent jumped almost 4% on escalating U.S.-Iran strikes, while Asian chip stocks stayed under pressure from Friday's Chinese AI shock.

item.title: 🚨NEW: Bitcoin developers have introduced BIP-361, a proposal designed to safeguard wallets against future quantum-computing risks. The proposal would: - Block new BTC transfers to addresses considered vulnerable to quantum attacks. - Phase out legacy - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9MZjh4UXpIR0NlSkU2TVVrWnJfTTJKWi1XTld4Yl9Dd19sUU0ySXRRT2lEemNQNzR5aWNIWU5NZVAyUkRWRUNzeGNzYW9IVHJpYTRtMTZMV3NMdTgySElaTA?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨NEW: Bitcoin developers have intro…

item.title: Cardano activates van Rossem hard fork
item.description: The upgrade reduces smart contract execution costs while laying the groundwork for Ouroboros Leios, a major scalability upgrade expected later this year.

item.title: Aurora Mainnet May Be Down According to Onchain Lens, Aurora mainnet has been down since 02:16:11 UTC and remains unavailable. Aurora is an EVM-compatible network built on NEAR Protocol, enabling Ethereum applications and smart contracts to run - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1vbFNtOEJZMFNVMVJSWGJSZFd3d1pUQ0xybk1GZkxBbnI0MWZCSDREN2dZdGRNRXJhR2VjaE84N01sUGxmakc5MWJabG5XTVVabmlHQkV2UFVGb1U2eVFBdVlZVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Aurora Mainnet May Be Down Accor…

item.title: Allbridge pauses cross-chain bridge after $1.65M exploit
item.description: The attacker allegedly used a flash loan and rapid swaps to manipulate the bridge’s stablecoin exchange rate.

item.title: Bitcoin (-27%) and Gold (-7%) are the two worst performing major assets so far in 2026. This is something we haven't seen before in any calendar year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5aYllYbUY0RTBtQ25vZ0JOYU1pTWZJYUNDNGRwMG5IY213Z3NfRDFUTEdnSURqbXJjWlNIUHUwUGhIOXdFbUJIV1c5WjFQc214UEwzLXlrbFI1SlNwR255R0FUVzR5QQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin (-27%) and Gold (-7%…

item.title: The GENIUS Act turns 1: State of Crypto
item.description: The stablecoin-focused GENIUS Act became a law a year ago.

item.title: There are two problems rn for crypto and, specifically, bitcoin bulls: 1) marginal liquidity would rather speculate in prediction markets and equity markets 2) marginal energy to mine BTC is worth 10-20x if reallocated to serving AI tokens These changes feel stru - x.com

item.title: It’s 2026 Bitcoin is more than halfway through its second year in the current #BTC Four Year Cycle 2025 proved to be the year of the $BTC Bull Market peak And 2026 has proven itself to be the year of the Bitcoin Bear Market 2027 will be the Bottoming Out yea - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin's biggest advocate, Michael Saylor, says new plan to clean up the blockchain is 'a bad idea'
item.description: Michael Saylor argues that a new proposal, BIP-110, to temporarily block "spam" data from the Bitcoin blockchain would undermine the network's neutrality and create a dangerous precedent for censorship.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at another Bitcoin announcement tomorrow 👀 What's next? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1CaWVheWE0SEN6RVhvcjBKZWZUU3dkaEtHa1hxVHNZZThCUHctVVF3TVpIQUtTS1R4SWFlR3FIc3c1UERhbzloVTgxN3ZoY3NLRnNHZVJTY3drMXprRXBrODU0TlFqZlk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: LATEST: ⚡ Sharplink CEO Joseph Chalom says Ethereum is becoming the "global settlement layer" in a way Bitcoin cannot be as "just a simple store of value." - x.com
